---
title: "Sinem Demirci"
subtitle: "*Pronounced:* **SEE-nem deh-meer-jee**"
image: sinem_demirci_2.jpeg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - text: ORCID
      href: "https://orcid.org/0000-0002-2095-0674"
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=r_R0R6wAAAAJ&hl=tr"
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:sdemirci@calpoly.edu"
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/drsinemdemirci/"
comments: false
---

::: column-page
### Bio

I am a Lecturer in the Statistics Department at Cal Poly. My interdisciplinary research spans Statistics & Data Science Education and Environmental & Sustainability Education.

I am a quantitative researcher in education and a qualitative researcher in statistics and data science education. Yes, you read that correctly. I use quantitative research methodologies to analyze large educational datasets and investigate teaching and learning at scale. At the same time, my work in Statistics and Data Science Education primarily employs qualitative research methodologies to better understand instructional practices, curriculum development, and students' learning experiences.

My research in Environmental and Sustainability Education exists in a parallel research universe. I love to read, write, and think about how people make sense of complex adaptive systems, what current educational approaches overlook, and how we might design learning experiences that cultivate systems literacy to live in a better planet.

### Academic and Professional Appointments

|  |  |  |
|:------------------|:-------------------------|:--------------------------|
| 2023 - Present | Statistics Department, <b> <a href = 'https://statistics.calpoly.edu/' target="_blank"> Cal Poly </b> </a> | Full-Time Lecturer |
| 2022 - 2023 | Dept. of Statistical Science, <b> <a href = 'https://www.ucl.ac.uk/statistics/' target="_blank"> UCL </b> </a> | (Postdoc) Visiting Researcher / Lecturer |
| 2021 - 2022 | <b> <a href = 'https://ted.org.tr/en/tedmem/' target="_blank"> TEDMEM </b> </a> (Think Tank) | Social and Educational Research Specialist |
| 2013 - 2020 | Dept. of Math. & Sci. Education, <b> <a href = 'https://mse.metu.edu.tr/en' target="_blank"> METU </b> </a> | Teaching & Research Assistant |

### Education

<b> <a href = 'https://metu.edu.tr' target="_blank"> Middle East Technical University </b> </a> \| Ankara, Turkey

|       |                                              |
|:------|:---------------------------------------------|
| Ph.D. | Elementary (Science) Education               |
| M.S.  | Statistics                                   |
| M.S.  | Elementary Science and Mathematics Education |
| B.S.  | Elementary Science Education                 |
:::
